words.meaning: money that you borrow and must pay back
words.example: They used a bank loan to open the cafe.
The rainy period usually lasts for several weeks.

words.meaning: worry or difficulty caused by too many demands
words.example: He felt pressure before the final exam.

words.meaning: something good received for work or good behavior
words.example: The teacher gave a reward for perfect attendance.

words.meaning: a part of a play, movie, or event
words.example: My favorite scene is at the end of the movie.
Read the first section of the article for homework.

words.meaning: several things of the same kind that come one after another
words.example: The library has a series of books about science.
Exercise helps me reduce stress after work.

words.meaning: a general change or popular style
words.example: The trend toward online shopping is growing.

words.meaning: a group of people who work together, especially on a ship, plane, or film
words.example: The film crew arrived before sunrise.
